name: Improper Locking
description: The product does not properly acquire or release a lock on a resource, leading to unexpected resource state changes, data corruption, denial of service, or deadlocks when multiple processes access shared resources.
detection_pattern: STORAGE[shared_resource] is accessed by multiple TRANSFORM or CONTROL paths where CONTROL[lock] nodes are missing, improperly ordered, or not released, causing potential deadlock or race conditions
